benefits.description: Noticeable difference with lower back, possibly helping with inflammation
Body feeling really quite good, something to this stack in terms of recovery
Feeling sharper, more clear headed, more optimistic and confident, better sense of wellbeing; feels younger and faster, moving around well

protocol_notes: OP started GLOW stack one week ago for osteoarthritis in lower back and depression. Reports mood and cognitive benefits after approximately 5-7 days. Stack contents not specified by OP but community members reference BPC-157 and GHK-Cu as components.
